title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 05 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 05 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 05 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/02/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures moved downwards after a higher opening, fluctuating downward throughout the day.The most-traded I2505 contract finally closed at 801 yuan/mt, down 0.99% for the day. On the first trading day after the holiday, traders actively offered goods. Steel mills made numerous inquiries but remained cautious in their purchases.
